sources.title: Werewolf of London - 1935
sources.description: After botanist Wilfred Glendon travels to Tibet in search of a rare flower, the Mariphasa, he returns to a London haunted by murders that can only be the work of bloodthirsty werewolves.

sources.title: WEREWOLF OF LONDON. 1935 (english) colorized
sources.description: After botanist Wilfred Glendon travels to Tibet in search of a rare flower, the Mariphasa, he returns to a London haunted by murders that can only be the work of bloodthirsty werewolves.

metadata.Plot: While on a botanical expedition in Tibet Dr. Wilfred Glendon is attacked in the dark by a strange animal. Returning to London, he finds himself turning nightly into a werewolf and terrorizing the city, with the only hope for curing his affliction a rare Asian flower, the Mariphasa.
metadata.Writer: John Colton, Robert Harris, Harvey Gates
metadata.Actors: Henry Hull, Warner Oland, Valerie Hobson
